datasets.title: Batch 1-5
datasets.description: 25 prompts from batch5, each compared across 3 model checkpoints.

items.prompt: A half-body insectoid android with glowing eyes and a sapphire tiara stands in a digital environment with translucent souls swirling continuously around its torso. The android turns its head to the right, raising its right arm to shoulder level. It extends its mechanical fingers forward, pausing for two seconds as the swirling energy passes over its hand. The android then closes its fingers into a fist, lowers its arm back to its side, and rotates its head back to face center while the camera slowly pushes in toward its face.

Ariana Grande, wearing a cottagecore Halloween dress, stands inside a rustic cottage next to lit candles. She extends her right arm forward toward a candle, holds her hand open for a moment, and then retracts it to her chest. She turns her head to the left, lowers her left hand to grip the side of her dress skirt, lifts the fabric outward once, and then lets it drop back down to her side. The camera slowly pushes forward throughout the sequence.

A woman in flowing garments drifts downward through a sunset sky and clouds in zero gravity, her hair and clothing billowing upward. She raises both arms outward to shoulder level, then brings her hands inward, pressing her palms together in front of her chest. She tilts her head backward, closes her eyes, and pulls her knees upward toward her torso, crossing her legs to settle into a floating seated pose. The camera tracks her steady downward movement.

A zombie skater wearing oversized hip-hop streetwear stands in a neon-lit urban skate park. He steps his left foot onto the ground and presses downward on the back edge of a skateboard with his right foot, popping the board upward. He extends his right hand forward to catch the middle of the board, brings it inward to rest vertically against his torso, and pauses briefly. He then turns his head to the right and holds his gaze steady. The loose fabric of his clothing ripples as the camera slowly orbits the figure.

A slow camera push-in reveals an alien hybrid creature with a segmented exoskeleton crouched inside a biomechanical hive with glowing organic nodes. The creature opens and closes its mandibles three times, then turns its elongated head to the right. It lifts its two front clawed limbs to chest level, twitching the joints inward toward its torso twice. Pausing in this position, its tail uncoils from behind its body and slides forward over the hive surface.

The camera moves steadily forward over a bay toward a medieval fantasy city built with stone fortresses and tall towers. The surface of the water ripples continuously. Wisps of mist drift horizontally from left to right between the stone docks at the edge of the water as the camera continues its forward approach.

In a dark underworld setting, Ares extends his right arm forward to hold a bouquet of flowers out toward Hades, pausing in this outstretched pose. Hades tilts his head back slightly, lowers his gaze to the flowers, and raises his left hand to chest level with an open, upward-facing palm. In the background, Aphrodite turns her head to the left to face them and folds both arms across her torso. Three loose petals drift downward from the bouquet while the characters' garments sway left and right. The camera slowly pushes in toward the flowers.

A Japanese girl with short hair, wearing a blood-stained hoodie and leg bandages, stands centered against a dark background. She lowers her chin slightly while keeping her gaze forward, then pulls the corners of her mouth upward into a wide smile. She raises her right hand to her face, extends her index finger, and wipes her lower lip once from left to right. Finally, she tilts her head to the right and holds the posture as her hair and hoodie drawstrings sway briefly, while the camera slowly pushes in toward her face.

Framed from the chest up, the chubbier man with short hair and a goatee turns his head to the right and pauses briefly. He raises his right hand to his chin, strokes his goatee twice with his fingers, then lowers his arm and turns his head back to face directly forward. The camera pushes in slightly toward his face during the sequence.

A young girl in a black military crusader maid outfit stands before a steampunk city, her long blonde hair blowing backward in the wind. She turns her head to the right, pausing for a moment, then raises her right hand to her chest. She touches her fingers to her collar, holds the gesture briefly, and lowers her arm back to her side before taking one short step forward with her left foot. The camera pushes in slightly toward her throughout the sequence.

A low-poly Shiba Inu dog stands upright on its hind legs in a dark space, holding a baseball bat raised above its head with both front paws. The dog holds the bat in this high position for a brief moment, then swings its front paws and the bat downward in a direct vertical arc. The bat stops abruptly at waist level to complete the strike. The dog holds the lowered bat briefly before lifting its front paws to return the bat to the starting position above its head. The camera slowly orbits the dog from left to right throughout the sequence.

A rugged male barkeep stands in a rustic fantasy tavern with drifting smoke and flickering warm light. He steps forward with his right foot, extending his right arm to place a wooden mug onto a table, then opens his fingers to release it. He retracts his arm, straightens his torso, turns his head to the left, and lowers both hands to rest them on his hips, holding the posture. The camera executes a slow push-in toward the subject.

A small lemon creature with textured citrus skin and leafy appendages stands against a plain neutral backdrop. The creature expands its round torso outward and retracts it inward once. It then lifts its right leafy appendage upward, moves it forward and backward twice, and tilts its upper body to the left. Finally, the creature lowers the appendage back to its side while the small leaves on top of its head bounce up and down three times. The camera slowly pushes forward throughout the sequence.

George Washington stands among clouds and light beams. He lifts his head, tilting his chin upward to look above. He then raises both arms outward and upward to shoulder level, turning his palms to face forward and fully extending his fingers. He holds this open-armed pose steadily. The camera slowly pans upward as small particles drift through the scene.

A black-skinned witch with cat ears and an ornate flower dress stands facing forward. She raises her right hand to her head, strokes her right cat ear twice with her index and middle fingers, and then lowers her arm to her side. She turns her head to the left, holding her gaze steady for the remainder of the shot. The fabric of her dress billows backward and her cat ears twitch repeatedly in a steady breeze as the camera pushes in slightly.

A cyclopean warforged warrior in ornate yellow armor stands amidst drifting dust particles. The warrior raises a massive shield to chest height with its left arm, pauses briefly, and steps forward with its right foot. It then lifts an engraved longsword with its right hand, extending the arm to point the blade straight forward, and holds the defensive pose. The camera slowly zooms in on the warrior.

A bunny sits on a rain-slicked street with neon reflections, holding a carrot in both front paws. The bunny raises the carrot to its mouth, takes two bites, and then lowers the carrot back to chest level. It turns its head to the right, twitches its nose three times, and pivots its long ears backward. The camera slowly pushes in forward as raindrops fall around the bunny.

The anime musician sits at a recording desk in a dark studio surrounded by professional audio equipment and a Mario Brothers prop. The musician leans their torso forward, extends their right hand, and pushes a single fader upward on the mixing console. They then turn their head to the left toward a monitor screen, pause, and lift their left hand to press against the side of their headphones. Holding the headphones in place, the musician nods their head twice as the equipment displays flicker in the background.

A woman stands in front of towering coastal cliffs with her hair and garments blowing backward. She turns her head to the right, pauses for one second, and raises her right hand to shoulder level. She extends her index and middle fingers to tuck a strand of hair behind her right ear. She then lowers her right arm down to her side and rotates her head back to face forward as the camera maintains a steady medium shot.

A ballerina resembling Imaan Hammam with sweaty skin, wearing ornate fantasy garments, stands in an ancient stone hall. She raises both arms upward above her head, crossing her wrists, then lifts her right leg outward to the side. She pivots on her left foot, turning her torso to the left to complete a half-turn. She then lowers her arms to shoulder level, extending her hands outward with open fingers, and holds the pose. The camera slowly orbits to the right around her during the sequence.

In a fantasy setting, a young girl raises her right hand, bringing an energy can to her lips. She tilts her head back slightly, holds the can to her mouth for two seconds to drink, and then lowers the arm back down to chest level. She levels her head and turns her gaze directly forward while her hair drifts slowly to the side. The camera slowly pushes in toward her face.

Albert Einstein, wearing futuristic tech wear and Jedi robes, stands in a sci-fi environment. He raises his right hand to shoulder level, extends his palm forward with open fingers, and holds the gesture for two seconds. He then retracts his arm, lowering his hand back to his side, and turns his head to the left. Small lights embedded in his suit blink twice during the movement. The camera slowly zooms in continuously toward his face and torso.

A woman wearing a red cap sits on a black horse, moving forward through a misty forest of oak and beech trees. The horse lifts its front left leg, taking a slow step forward on the forest floor. The woman holds the reins in both hands, turns her head to the right to look toward the trees, pauses briefly, and then turns her head back to face forward. She lowers her hands slightly toward the saddle while keeping her back straight as the horse takes another step. The camera tracks steadily alongside the horse and rider.

A pale woman kneels at the edge of a pond under a night sky displaying one large central star and seven smaller stars. She holds a container in each hand at waist level. She tilts both wrists forward simultaneously, pouring steady streams of water from the containers. Keeping her wrists tilted, she slowly sweeps her arms from left to right once, directing one water stream onto the nearby soil and the other directly into the pond, creating outward ripples on the water surface. On a nearby branch, a bird turns its head to the left while the camera slowly pushes forward.

A scientist with wild hair, goggles, and a lab coat stands in a suburban backyard as several hamburgers tumble downward from the sky. He tilts his head backward, opens his mouth wide, and raises both arms upward with open palms. He holds this upward pose briefly, then lowers his head forward, shifts his gaze to track the falling objects, and extends his right arm forward with open fingers to reach for a hamburger. Throughout the 5-second shot, the hamburgers drop continuously, the bottom hem of the lab coat flaps backward in the wind, and the camera slowly zooms out.
